allow: Bash(python3 -c "from app.schemas.auth import UserPublic; from app.api.v1.auth import _public_user; print\('schemas OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('access:', d['access_token'][:40], '...'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'OK — {len\(d\)} users'\); [print\(f'  - {u[\\"email\\"]} platform={u[\\"is_platform_admin\\"]} grp={u[\\"is_groupement_admin\\"]} assoc={u[\\"is_association_admin\\"]}'\) for u in d]")
